b,icon is flash white slowly when controller connect to APP through BLE or connect to AWS but disable to be controlled.

• Fixed splash logo blocking behavior
• Fixed start timeout alarm auto-clean crash
• Improved AWS full shadow publish retry
• Improved AWS full shadow publish retry
• Fixed night mode update during power-on
• Fixed night mode update during power-on

• PID / temperature control
• - Add `integral_separation_f` field to `nhd_band_t` and wire it through `nhd_apply_band()`.
  Previously missing, causing it to silently fall back to the 40°F default and freezing
  the integrator in the error range required to close the last ~42°F gap.
• - Raise `integral_separation_f` to 100°F in the 425–710°F band so the integrator
  remains active during the full high-temperature climb.
• - Increase gains in the top 700°F band for stronger proportional drive when far from the setpoint:
• - Kp: 0.35 → 0.55
• - Ki: 0.025 → 0.032
• - Scale `baseline_air_ff()` peak from 25% → 35% for the 700°F model to reflect  higher airflow demand near maximum target.
• Startup / system fixes
• - Fix start logo ready flag bug.
• - Fix start timeout message logic.
• - Fix autoclean startup bug.
• Fix the controller crash Post and move the log out of tmr srv to avoid overflows.

• Encoder polling period to 10ms

• Fix assert in lvgl_flush_cb during TURN OFF

bugs.title: PID tunning
bugs.description: The fan temperature control overshoots the target by about 50 degrees and only stabilizes once it falls back to the set temperature. The maintenance state allows a 10-degree oscillation, which could be improved by splitting the buffer to 5 degrees above and below the target.The fan behavior consistently leads to an overshoot after setting the target temperature, and the pause function on the control board is not working.

bugs.title: Alarm
bugs.description: Alarms need some work. I got start up timeout alarms when my grill was 75 degrees over the target temp, immediately after setting a target temp, and once even after my grill at been stable at target for about 15 minutes

bugs.title: Wifi icon
bugs.description: Notably the wifi symbol seems stretched vertically both in its small form at the top of the main readout, and when the large form is displayed during provisioning.

bugs.title: On board pause
bugs.description: On board pause function not working when long pressing screen button.

bugs.title: Power up sequence
bugs.description: Is there a way to flash the logo when the battery is engaged instead of just a dark screen and a beep? It doesn't feel as good as when the screen also acknowledges getting power.

bugs.title: Wifi icon in footer
bugs.description: wifi icon overlap

bugs.title: PID tunning
bugs.description: Notably it seemed at one point the Venom got confused, thinking my target was 450 instead of 270 like it was set to. I had to turn the Venom off and re set the target to get it close to my target again, though it still is overshooting pretty badly.

bugs.title: Open vent issue
bugs.description: Sometimes after selecting the target temp the top vent stays on and the footer is not cleaning the set temp messages

bugs.title: Crash on cooking
bugs.description: I set a temp and waited for the grill to hit the target temp. When I came back out, the grill was off.

bugs.title: PID tunning
bugs.description:
PID control seems much better, I'm just wondering how much more dialed in we can get it. On my 10/31 cook it seems like it was very accurate when it took the temp from 0-250 but when the grill was already hot and I dropped the temp it seems like it struggled with letting the temp fall far enough. It would bounce up and down above 225 with slowly decreasing increments until it settled in at 225 over time. I'm wondering if there's some logic we can apply for that scenario, as I don't remember having this issue before. 

On my 10/29 cook it almost seems like the window for the temp control was smaller, but it was just set to oscillate over my target temp and not over. It ran about 10 degrees hot most of the time, jumping back up after it would fall down to my target temp. I'm not noticing any other real graphical errors or system bugs, although I did have another instance of receiving a Low Temp Alert in the app immediately after setting my target temp on this cook.

bugs.title: visual glitch
bugs.description: We also identified a visual glitch that occurs after calibration — the main rectangle appears oversized.

bugs.title: sound glitch
bugs.description: I uncovered a bug where the alarm sound continues playing from the controller. This happened when my meat probe hit its target, triggering the alarm, and I set a new target in the app. The visual alert went away but the alarm sound continued to play no matter what I pressed until I finally set the target on the control board itself.

bugs.title: random crash on batch 5
bugs.description: On the webcraft test, when I set the target temp to 500 through the app the Controller shut itself off for some reason. I only noticed because I went to adjust the vents and it was off.

bugs.title: PID tunnig for keetle in low cook temps  and medium temp cooks
bugs.description: In low temperature target the grill behaves very wavy, and was running hot

bugs.title: PID tunnig for keetle in low cook temps  and medium temp cooks
bugs.description: In low temperature target the grill behaves very wavy, and was running hot

bugs.title: Pause indication
bugs.description: add PAUSE message to footer while fan is paused

bugs.title: Start SG logo
bugs.description: Sometime is the user press to mcuth time the power on button the device will get stuck swhouing the Start Screen logo. Current solution disconnect the controller and wait 30 seconds.

bugs.title: Controller Error LOG
bugs.description: We are going modify the current crash and error tracking int he controller to improve error handling tracking

bugs.title: 425 to 700F band
bugs.description: The FAN is not going to 100% when the setpoint is 700 use Matthewś cooks to check this

bugs.title: 4 grill PID tables
bugs.description: Evaluate the option to do a Hidden Menu to be able to select the Kettle, Webcraft, Huntsman, Giant Huntsman

bugs.title: Timeout error message
bugs.description: When startup alarm finish to sound release the bottom message if user never acknowledge it

bugs.title: Start SG logo it seems bug #0019 is not fixed
bugs.description: Sometimes when turning ON the controller, the device will stay stucked in the LOGO screen

bugs.title: Connectivity issue
bugs.description: Some controllers are disconnecting from AWS. We need to determine why AWS is rejecting or disconnecting the devices. Sometimes the connection returns after about 10 minutes, and other times it takes up to an hour. We will work on replicating the conditions to identify the cause.

bugs.title: Crash
bugs.description: Random crash after the initial timeour error

bugs.title: Temperature unit glitch
bugs.description: Controller will randomly switch from F to C when powering on sometimes
